Name: TSA Open Championship 2026 — Score Entry Instructions
Enter Card 1, Card 2, Card 3 scores and centres separately.
Enter Open Card 1 and Open Card 2 separately.
The workbook calculates 300.30, Open 200.20, and Overall 500.50 totals.
Export the Score Entry sheet as CSV for the dashboard.
Valid grades: Master, A, B, C, D.
Tie break: score first, then centres.
